_comment: Runtime-decrypted native strings from com.snake.helper.Native.ilil(index), recovered live via Frida Gadget (LD_PRELOAD) active extraction. These were encrypted at rest in libengine.so and only exist in cleartext at runtime.
interpretation: The engine intercepts Google Play Games / Miniclip authentication: hooks com.miniclip.googleplaygames.Authentication, drives a Google OAuth flow (client id 918010152455-..., id_token) against https://snakeengine.com/oauth/google, and injects loginCallback / onLoginResult into the target game.
